ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the staff member works at */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., Teacher, Principal) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to (e.g., Math, English) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Job description of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget is allocated to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget allocation (e.g., Salaries, Supplies) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was allocated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_spending" (
  "spending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget spending */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget was spent at */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget spending (e.g., Salaries, Supplies) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount spent */,
  "spending_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was spent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spending */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number of the spending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_spending_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the metric is for */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of academic performance metric (e.g., Test Scores, Graduation Rate) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student was present */,
  "absence_reason" TEXT /* Reason for absence (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the resource is allocated to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., Computers, Books) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the check was performed on */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., Safety, Financial) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the compliance check */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Teacher, Parent) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_courses" (
  "staff_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff course */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_courses_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
